# Nüll. - Premium Business Marketing & Webdesign

Nüll. is a premium digital agency based in Mannheim, Germany, specializing in high-end web design and digital positioning for consultants, experts, and professional service firms.

## Core Services
- **Premium Webdesign**: Custom-engineered websites with a focus on speed, aesthetics, and conversion.
- **Digital Positioning**: Helping consultants transform their expertise into a premium digital brand.
- **Lead Acquisition Systems**: Building predictable marketing funnels that go beyond word-of-mouth.
- **Bilingual Excellence**: Specialized expertise in the German-Turkish business landscape.

## Technical Excellence
- **Framework**: Built with React Router 7 and Vite.
- **Performance**: Fully static-site generated (SSG) for maximum speed and SEO.
- **Global Reach**: Multi-lingual support for German (DE), Turkish (TR), and English (EN).

## Key Contact Information
- **Location**: Mannheim, Germany
- **Website**: https://nüll.com (Punycode: https://xn--nll-hoa.com)
- **Email**: hello@xn--nll-hoa.com
- **WhatsApp**: +49 162 7176334

## Mission
To empower experts with digital authorities that reflect their true value and command respect in a competitive market.
